faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions
faq.q1: How do I book a session?
faq.a1: Choose a plan, pick a date and time, and confirm your booking. You can pay online via our secure payment.
faq.a2: You can reschedule or cancel at least 24 hours before your session. Contact us for any changes.
faq.a3: Yes, we have plans for both one-on-one and group sessions. Check our Programs section for details.
